## Preferences

Mornings are deep work — nothing interactive before noon. Bullet points over prose.

## Sacred time

Choir practice Thursdays 19:00-21:00 is non-negotiable. Flag conflicts, never resolve them
silently.

## Red lines

Drafts fine, sending not. Money and commitments to other people always get an explicit ask.
